creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Carlos, feel free not to attach QA logs if you include a summary of testing in your issue descriptions. Eg:

* portlint: OK|WARN
* testport: OK (poudriere: <archs> <versions>, <options>, <combinations> tested)

Also don't forget:

* Set maintainer-approval to + on attachments for ports you are maintainer of instead of [MAINTAINER] in Summary.
